Stocking_Strategy: Maintain controlled safety stock and use frequent demand monitoring. Because products have high order values and high volatility, excessive inventory could lock up significant capital.
Maintain controlled safety stock and use frequent demand monitoring. Because products have high order values and high volatility, excessive inventory could lock up significant capital.
Maintain lean inventory with regular replenishment. Demand is relatively stable but overall sales volume is lower, so excessive safety stock is unnecessary.
